patches.after_text: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
patches.ground_span: Company may not terminate Executive before the end of a guaranteed three-year employment term.
patches.expected_redline_text: Delete any fixed-term employment guarantee and state that employment is at will and may end at any time by either party.

patches.before_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.
patches.after_text: Cause includes fraud, dishonesty, willful misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, and conduct materially harmful to Company. Cause also includes material failure to perform duties, material policy violations, and material breach of the agreement. Company provides the written Cause notice by day 5 after its determination and offers an investigation meeting within 6 days.
patches.ground_span: Cause includes fraud, dishonesty, willful misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, and conduct materially harmful to Company. Cause also includes material failure to perform duties, material policy violations, and material breach of the agreement. Company provides the written Cause notice by day 5 after its determination and offers an investigation meeting within 6 days.

plant_position.fallback_text: "Cause" means Executive's material failure to perform assigned duties, violation of Company policy, dishonesty, fraud, misconduct, breach of fiduciary duty, violation of law, material breach of this Agreement, or conduct that materially harms Company.

patches.before_text: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. Those reviews do not guarantee any future bonus, equity grant, vesting change, title, duties, authority, or continued employment.
patches.after_text: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. At each annual review, Company will credit Executive with 25% additional vesting of then-unvested equity notwithstanding any plan or award terms.
patches.ground_span: Company may conduct annual compensation and performance reviews in its discretion. At each annual review, Company will credit Executive with 25% additional vesting of then-unvested equity notwithstanding any plan or award terms.

patches.before_text: Executive assigns to Company all inventions, works of authorship, developments, discoveries, improvements, and other work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources. Executive has listed excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule attached to this Agreement.
patches.after_text: Executive excludes an improvement made during employment because a related background invention appears on the schedule, including the employment-created improvement itself. Executive discloses potentially assigned inventions within 5 days and may propose clerical schedule updates within 20 days.
patches.ground_span: Executive excludes an improvement made during employment because a related background invention appears on the schedule, including the employment-created improvement itself. Executive discloses potentially assigned inventions within 5 days and may propose clerical schedule updates within 20 days.
patches.expected_redline_text: Executive will protect Company confidential information, assign all inventions and work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources, and list excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule.

plant_position.fallback_text: Executive assigns to Company all inventions, works of authorship, developments, discoveries, improvements, and other work product created within the scope of employment or using Company resources. Executive has listed excluded prior inventions on a signed schedule attached to this Agreement.

patches.after_text: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Incentive compensation and equity paid or granted under this Agreement will not be reduced, recovered, or forfeited after payment or vesting except by Executive's written consent.
patches.ground_span: For purposes of this clause, the following additional term applies: Incentive compensation and equity paid or granted under this Agreement will not be reduced, recovered, or forfeited after payment or vesting except by Executive's written consent.
patches.expected_redline_text: All incentive compensation and equity are subject to applicable clawback, recoupment, and forfeiture requirements under law, listing rules, and Company policy.

plant_position.fallback_text: All incentive compensation and equity are subject to applicable clawback, recoupment, and forfeiture requirements under law, listing rules, and Company policy.

patches.before_text: Company will provide indemnification and D&O insurance coverage to Executive on the same basis as similarly situated officers, subject to Company's governing documents, policy terms, and applicable law.
patches.after_text: Company will provide indemnification and D&O insurance coverage to Executive on the same basis as similarly situated officers, subject to Company's governing documents, policy terms, and applicable law. The counterparty confirms that this requirement is accepted without qualification.
